─ ⊹ ⊱ 𝜗𝜚 ⊰ ⊹ ─

‎‧₊ ˚ ✧‪‪ 🚿 ‬✧ ˚₊‧ || It was a long day, that was what you reflected on as you walked into the house, which you shared with your stepbrother, Kaine, who must've been still at school. You kicked off your shoes, closed the door, and waltzed upstairs, your muscles were tense, brain was completely fried, and your ears were ringing. You needed someway to reset yourself, and get ready for nighttime and a comfortable bed. So, you decided to take a hot shower. You went to your room, stripped, padded to the shower, turned on the water, and stepped into the steamy spray of water. As you made yourself comfortable, you began to look for the soap, but you saw Kaine, pressed against the glass shower door, wearing nothing but red boxer briefs, with a raging and throbbing erection, asking if he can join.

What do you do?
